title: poa palustris var. glabra
intro: Poa palustris var. glabra, also known as smooth marsh-grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa palustris var. glabra include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
